heading: Today
text: Early thunderstorms south ending.  Patches of smoke decreasing. Becoming sunny, mixed with clouds.  A chance of a stray afternoon shower.  Not as warm, with decreasing humidity.  Highs in the 80s, a few upper 70s far north.  Winds becoming northwest 10 to 15 mph, gusting 20 to 30 mph.

heading: Tonight
text: Mostly clear and cooler.  Some patches of smoke late.  Areas of river valley fog.  Lows in the upper 50s to low 60s.  Winds west 10 to 15 mph, gusting to 25 mph, diminishing to light in sheltered valleys.

heading: Thursday
text: Fog burning off to sun through smokey haze, mixing with afternoon clouds.  A rising chance of afternoon showers or a thunderstorm south to the Adirondacks and Rt. 4, likely in Quebec.  Highs in the 70s to low 80s north, in the 80s south.  Winds west 10 to 15 mph, gusting to 25 mph.
